channel.title: Rx Shortage Radar - Resolved
channel.description: Latest public FDA drug shortage records with status Resolved from openFDA.

item.title: Resolved: Hydrocortisone Sodium Succinate Injection (0009-0005-01)
item.description: Solu-cortef, Injection, 1000 mg/vial (NDC 0009-0005-01) Status: Resolved Updated: 2026-02-24 Company: Hospira, Inc., a Pfizer Company
